SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated

Class FlowlineBranch

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.fielddevelopment.integrated.FlowlineBranch
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, NetworkBranch
public class FlowlineBranch extends Object implements NetworkBranch
A flowline (or generic pressure-drop) branch in an integrated production network.

The branch represents the hydraulic resistance between two nodes using a quadratic pressure-drop law that captures both laminar/friction and turbulent/kinetic contributions plus a static elevation head:

dP = pUp - pDown = staticHead + a·q + b·q²

where a (bar per Sm3/day) and b (bar per (Sm3/day)²) are friction coefficients and staticHead (bar) is the elevation/hydrostatic term. Given the two node pressures the branch inverts this relation to return the volumetric flow, which lets it slot directly into the NetworkNewtonSolver node-balance equations. Coefficients can be set directly, derived from a single reference operating point, or fitted to a detailed multiphase pipe model with fromBeggsBrillSample(java.lang.String, java.lang.String, java.lang.String, neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline.PipeBeggsAndBrills).

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

  • Constructor Details

    • FlowlineBranch

      public FlowlineBranch(String name, String fromNode, String toNode, double linearCoeff, double quadraticCoeff, double staticHeadBar)
      Creates a flowline branch with explicit pressure-drop coefficients.
      Parameters:
      name - unique branch name
      fromNode - upstream node name
      toNode - downstream node name
      linearCoeff - linear friction coefficient a in bar per Sm3/day
      quadraticCoeff - quadratic friction coefficient b in bar per (Sm3/day)²
      staticHeadBar - static elevation head in bar (positive = upstream below downstream)

  • Method Details

    • fromReferencePoint

      public static FlowlineBranch fromReferencePoint(String name, String fromNode, String toNode, double referencePressureDropBar, double referenceRateSm3PerDay, double staticHeadBar)
      Builds a flowline branch whose quadratic coefficient is fitted to a single reference operating point (pure turbulent assumption, a = 0).
      Parameters:
      name - unique branch name
      fromNode - upstream node name
      toNode - downstream node name
      referencePressureDropBar - measured pressure drop at the reference rate, in bar
      referenceRateSm3PerDay - reference rate in Sm3/day
      staticHeadBar - static elevation head in bar
      Returns:
      a flowline branch

    • fromBeggsBrillSample

      public static FlowlineBranch fromBeggsBrillSample(String name, String fromNode, String toNode, PipeBeggsAndBrills pipe)
      Builds a flowline branch by fitting the quadratic coefficient to a detailed Beggs and Brill multiphase pipe model evaluated at its current inlet conditions.

      The detailed pipe is run once to obtain a representative pressure drop at its current flow rate; the resulting coefficient is reused cheaply inside the network solve. The static head is taken from the pipe elevation and the reference fluid density.

      Parameters:
      name - unique branch name
      fromNode - upstream node name
      toNode - downstream node name
      pipe - a configured and run Beggs and Brill pipe model
      Returns:
      a flowline branch fitted to the pipe model

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the branch name.
      Specified by:
      getName in interface NetworkBranch
      Returns:

      Returns:

    • flow

      public double flow(double upstreamPressureBara, double downstreamPressureBara)
      Computes the volumetric flow through the branch.
      Specified by:
      flow in interface NetworkBranch
      Parameters:
      upstreamPressureBara - upstream node pressure in bara
      downstreamPressureBara - downstream node pressure in bara
      Returns:
      volumetric surface flow in Sm3/day, positive from upstream to downstream
